title: Metals Extend Gains As China Boost Support For Property Sector
section_path: Metals Extend Gains As China Boost Support For Property Sector
section_path_text: Metals Extend Gains As China Boost Support For Property Sector
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
The prospect of further stimulus measures in China continued to support commodity markets. Tightening supplies in the energy sector were also supportive. Copper and iron ore extended yesterday's rally after China pledged support for its beleaguered property sector.
